title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
